title: Semipro Podracing Circuit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Semipro Podracing Circuit''' was a series of seven [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] courses across [[Planet/Legends|planets]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. Beginning and ending on [[Aquilaris]], these courses were deemed harder and longer than the ones found in the [[Amateur Podracing Circuit|Amateur Circuit]] while being less difficult than the [[Galactic Podracing Circuit/Legends|Galactic Podracing Circuit]].

Bookended by races on Aquilaris, the circuit would return to [[Ando Prime/Legends|Ando Prime]], [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]], and [[Mon Gazza/Legends|Mon Gazza]] for more difficult realignments of their Amateur Circuit tracks, while also featuring the first races on [[Ord Ibanna]] and [[Baroonda/Legends|Baroonda]].

==Courses==
#[[Sunken City/Legends|Sunken City]]
#[[Howler Gorge/Legends|Howler Gorge]]
#[[Dug Derby/Legends|Dug Derby]]
#[[Scrapper's Run/Legends|Scrapper's Run]]
#[[Zugga Challenge/Legends|Zugga Challenge]]
#[[Baroo Coast/Legends|Baroo Coast]]
#[[Bumpy's Breakers]]

==Behind the scenes==
Completing races in the Semipro Circuit would unlock the playable characters [[Navior|"Bullseye" Navior]], [[Ratts Tyerell/Legends|Ratts Tyerell]], [[Wan Sandage/Legends|Wan Sandage]], [[Boles Roor/Legends|Boles Roor]], [[Neva Kee/Legends|Neva Kee]], and [[Ark Roose/Legends|Ark "Bumpy" Roose]]. Finishing first in all races would unlock the second race of the [[Invitational Podracing Circuit]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']]
